message:
Revert 9 ADOPTERS.md PRs merged without operator approval (#10946)

Scanner agent merged ADOPTERS PRs that require explicit operator
approval. These entries were added by outreach but need verification
before merging. Reverts: #8187 (KubeVirt), #4036 (SlimToolkit/Mint),
#4039 (Harbor), #4040 (Kubean), #4046 (Longhorn), #10937 (Model Pack),
#10938 (Drasi), #4043 (Kairos), #7889 (Chaos Mesh).

The corresponding PRs remain open with hold labels so the outreach
agent can re-submit them for operator review when ready.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,12 +16,3 @@ Listed below are organizations that have adopted, or benefitted from, KubeStella
 | kube-vip | Guided install mission for kube-vip via KubeStellar Console, with upstream collaboration tracked in [kube-vip/kube-vip#1472](https://github.com/kube-vip/kube-vip/issues/1472) | Sandbox | [kube-vip](https://kube-vip.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kube-vip) |
 | Submariner | Guided install mission for Submariner via KubeStellar Console using the current `subctl` workflow (deploy-broker, join, verify, cross-cluster connectivity), endorsed in [submariner-io/submariner#3907](https://github.com/submariner-io/submariner/issues/3907) | Sandbox | [Submariner](https://submariner.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-submariner) |
 | Kmesh | Guided install mission for Kmesh via KubeStellar Console, with engagement tracked in [kmesh-net/kmesh#1609](https://github.com/kmesh-net/kmesh/issues/1609) | Sandbox | [Kmesh](https://kmesh.net) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kmesh) |
-| Chaos Mesh | Guided install mission for Chaos Mesh via KubeStellar Console, with maintainer @STRRL explicitly requesting a new install doc in [chaos-mesh/chaos-mesh#4858](https://github.com/chaos-mesh/chaos-mesh/issues/4858#issuecomment-4240793340) and docs PR [chaos-mesh/website#447](https://github.com/chaos-mesh/website/pull/447) | Incubating | [Chaos Mesh](https://chaos-mesh.org) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-chaos-mesh) |
-| Kairos | Guided install mission for Kairos via KubeStellar Console, with interest from Kairos maintainer @mudler in [kairos-io/kairos#4014](https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/issues/4014) | Sandbox | [Kairos](https://kairos.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kairos) |
-| Drasi | Guided install mission for Drasi verified end-to-end by a Drasi maintainer, with engagement and fixes tracked in [drasi-project/drasi-platform#400](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-platform/issues/400) | Sandbox | [Drasi](https://drasi.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-drasi) |
-| Model Pack | Guided install mission for Model CSI Driver via KubeStellar Console, with engagement tracked in [modelpack/model-csi-driver#30](https://github.com/modelpack/model-csi-driver/issues/30) | N/A | [Model CSI Driver](https://github.com/modelpack/model-csi-driver) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-modelpack-csi-driver) |
-| Longhorn | Guided install mission for Longhorn via KubeStellar Console, with active collaboration from Longhorn maintainers [derekbit](https://github.com/derekbit) and [PhanLe1010](https://github.com/PhanLe1010) in [longhorn/longhorn#12809](https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/12809) | Incubating | [Longhorn](https://longhorn.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-longhorn) |
-| Kubean | Guided install mission for Kubean via KubeStellar Console, bookmarked by Kubean maintainer [ErikJiang](https://github.com/ErikJiang) in [kubean-io/kubean#1761](https://github.com/kubean-io/kubean/issues/1761) | Sandbox | [Kubean](https://github.com/kubean-io/kubean) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kubean) |
-| Harbor | Guided install mission for Harbor via KubeStellar Console, with interest from Harbor community member @Vad1mo in [goharbor/harbor#23006](https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/23006) | Graduated | [Harbor](https://goharbor.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-harbor) |
-| SlimToolkit / Mint | Guided install mission for SlimToolkit (now Mint) via KubeStellar Console, with active collaboration from maintainer @kcq in [slimtoolkit/slim#844](https://github.com/slimtoolkit/slim/issues/844) on mission content and recommended install approach | Sandbox | [Mint](https://github.com/mintoolkit/mint) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-slimtoolkit) |
-| KubeVirt | Guided install mission for KubeVirt via KubeStellar Console, rewritten against the upstream user guide at https://kubevirt.io/user-guide/cluster_admin/installation/ (operator + CR manifests from the GitHub release, not a third-party Helm chart), with per-namespace-scoped uninstall, emulation-mode and AppArmor troubleshooting, and virtctl via krew. Engagement tracked in [kubevirt/kubevirt#13311](https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/issues/13311) | Incubating | [KubeVirt](https://kubevirt.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kubevirt) |
